programmes.show_description: Meg Goes to College: Meg is admitted to Brown University, but after being suspended for her application being a fraud, has to prove she deserves to be there.
Family Time: US animated comedy series. Stan and the family go out to dinner at a buffet restaurant, and Roger becomes a flower.
Plot Heavy: When Stan sells off the coveted family plot, the Smiths open their own cemetery in their backyard with the help of a basketball Hall of Famer.
The Amazing Rudy: Animated comedy. Bob and Linda get a chance to see how kind Louise can be when an embarrassed Rudy runs away from a monthly dinner with his divorced parents.

Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Robin teaches the other Titans about the art of concealment through a game of hide and seek.
Dead Justice: Animated adventures. Dead Justice, an undead cowboy sheriff, returns to take back his job, but the gang realise that he might not be the good Samaritan he claims to be.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. It's Billie's birthday and Greg has a rather unusual treat in store for her, and there is cause for concern after Chatty drops a health bombshell.
Everyone is hoping for a relaxing time as some of the group head out on a boat to celebrate Amy's birthday while the rest of the gang have a pool day, but the peace doesn't last.
The Moore the Merrier: US reality series. Porsha and Dennis's relationship hits a rough patch, while Kenya relishes her new role as mother to daughter Brooklyn.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Sweet Home Augusta: US reality series. Sutton plans a trip back home to Augusta with Garcelle and Kyle, but not everyone is met with good old Southern hospitality.
Husband-and-wife team Kevin and Efe ride their luck to try to win life-changing money on the Limitless Ladder, but their dreams for great goals are soon hanging in the balance.
Graham Norton welcomes office manager Shirley, financial management assistant Cameron, and police investigation officer Adele as they take on the Wheel for up to 50,000 pounds.
The sun in Portugal isn't the only thing that's getting our Essex crew hot and bothered as Harry and Freddie go head-to-head and Saff has a heated confrontation with Chloe.
Till Death Do Us Bark: Reality series. An unexpected face shows up to support a brokenhearted Lystra as she says an emotional goodbye to Louis in the ultimate send-off.
Cheatin' Heart: Kenya unleashes her opinions on Cynthia, and Porsha drops an unexpected bombshell. Cynthia and Kandi try to clean up the aftermath of the Barbie Bash.

programmes.show_description: Mind Your Business: US reality series. Dorit and PK reconnect as Erika senses a trap, and old wounds reopen when Sutton confronts her mother at her childhood home.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Jenny Ryan, David Baddiel, and Hollie Arnold all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
